chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 868 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of matter 1. For orders on CMA No.1296/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.1297/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1298/2024 (151 CPC) 28.03.2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Petitioner had applied for the post of Primary School Teacher on minority quota and qualified all the tests, buts because of stay order operating in Civil Suits No.1493 & 1322 of 2023, passed by a Single Bench of this Court at Karachi, he was not given offer order; hence, he filed this petition, which was disposed of vide order dated 19.03.2024, directing the authority to give him offer order as per recommendations of the relevant committee, and as undertaken by learned AAG. However, in paragraph 2 of the order instead of “minority quota”, the word “deceased quota” was mentioned inadvertently; hence, he has filed listed application for making necessary correction. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh, present in Court in some other matters, has waived notice and recorded no objection to grant of this application. Accordingly, this application is allowed with consent. Instead of “deceased quota” in paragraph 2 or anywhere in the order dated 19.03.2024, the word “minority quota” shall be read. Accordingly, this application is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
